mapper.select: select id, name, password, state from jg_admin where name = #{name} and password = md5(#{password}) and CAST(state AS SIGNED)>0
select id,phone,name,image,state from jg_user where name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
select id, name, state from jg_admin
mapper.insert: insert into jg_admin (name, password, state) values (#{name}, md5(#{password}), 1)
insert into jg_admin (name, password, state) values (#{name}, md5(#{password}), #{state})
